rationale.fidelity: Maintains selection before status revelation, the at-most-200 capacity, review-dependent revelation and removal, and expected prevented harm.
rationale.managerial_framing: Fully specifies actor, shift trigger, scarce-capacity choice, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, and alternative review sets.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or asserted.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats score calibration as an assumption and rejects perfect knowledge and guaranteed prevention.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and precise but considerably longer and more repetitive than the prompt requires, with minor encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A complete, model-faithful framing of scarce review attention with no information leakage or other hard failure.
